target.name: Hailo
target.founder: Orr Danon, Hadar Zeitlin, Avi Baum

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $336M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $529M - $7.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 24.4x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: SambaNova Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $5B

private.name: Tenstorrent
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $2.7B

data.narrative:
Hailo is a Series D semiconductor chip company that has raised $336M+ to date. The valuation analysis triangulates across a comp universe of 8 private peers and 3 public semiconductor benchmarks (ALAB, NVDA, AMD), with private comparables including SambaNova Systems, Tenstorrent, PsiQuantum, and Cerebras at adjacent stages.

Two methods proved applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.5x step-up multiplier typical of Series D advancement, yielding $504M. Peer-median anchoring across four same-sector, same/adjacent-stage companies (SambaNova at $5.0B Series D, Tenstorrent at $2.7B Series D, PsiQuantum at $7.0B Series E, DEEPX at $529M Series C) produces a median of $3.9B, with a range of $529M to $7.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (sector median 24.4x across three public tickers) was inapplicable due to the absence of disclosed revenue for the target.

The triangulated valuation range is $428M (low) to $4.4B (high), with a median of $2.2B. The wide dispersion reflects two offsetting factors: stage-progression yields a conservative floor anchored to capital deployed, while peer-median pulls toward higher multiples given comparable companies' recent funding rounds at elevated valuations. Key uncertainties include the degree to which Hailo's market positioning and traction justify premium positioning within the peer set, and whether recent private-market multiples in frontier chip remain sustainable.
